summary: Stop ID Stability Regression Testing Complete. All 17 tests passed. The fix for Stop ID mutation bug (removing default_factory from Stop.id) is working correctly. All CRUD endpoints return stable IDs, no ValidationErrors occur, and IDs remain unchanged across all operations.
critical_code_review_comments: Stop model (line 151): id: str is now required with no default_factory - CORRECT
All Stop(**doc) reconstructions work because MongoDB docs have the id field
No ValidationErrors occur on any endpoint - verified by tests
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup their own test data (TEST_ prefixed stops)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stop ID stability bug fix verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_stop_id_stability.py covers all CRUD endpoints and ID stability scenarios. The Stop model now has id: str (required, no default) and uuid generation happens only in creation endpoints.

TestStopIDStability.test_get_stops_returns_stable_ids: PASS - GET /api/stops returns stops with valid IDs, no _id field
TestStopIDStability.test_get_stops_twice_returns_identical_i: PASS - IDs stable across multiple fetches

TestStopIDStabilityEdgeCases.test_multiple_reads_same_stop: PASS - Same stop ID stable across 5 reads

verified_endpoints: GET /api/stops - Returns all stops with stable IDs
POST /api/stops - Creates stop with generated UUID
POST /api/optimize - Optimizes route, preserves all IDs
GET /api/car/next-stops - Returns incomplete stops with valid IDs

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Stop IDs were mutating/regenerating on reads due to Pydantic default_factory
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Made id required in Stop model (no default_factory), 2) Added explicit uuid.uuid4() generation only in creation endpoints
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All tests confirm IDs are stable across all operations
